source_rationale: PRG4 (proteoglycan 4/lubricin) is a marker of mesenchymal progenitor cells in adipose tissue
PI16 is a well-established marker of universal fibroblast/adipocyte progenitor cells
Fibrillin-1 is an extracellular matrix gene characteristic of adipose-derived stromal/progenitor cells
Microfibril-associated protein 5 is expressed in mesenchymal progenitors and marks adipocyte precursors
CD248 (endosialin) is a marker of mesenchymal stromal/progenitor cells including adipocyte precursors
IGFBP5 is involved in IGF signaling critical for adipogenesis and marks adipocyte progenitors
Collagen type I alpha 1 is highly expressed in mesenchymal/fibroblastic adipocyte precursor cells
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in adipose progenitor populations
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor complex and a canonical B cell lineage marker
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell surface marker used clinically for B cell identification
Immunoglobulin kappa constant region reflects active immunoglobulin production by B cells/plasma cells
IgM heavy chain is expressed by naive and memory B cells as part of the B cell receptor
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in B cells for MHC class II antigen presentation
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor and specific B cell marker
J chain is essential for polymeric immunoglobulin assembly in antibody-secreting B cells
T cell receptor gamma constant 2 is a defining marker of gamma delta T cells
CD7 is a T/NK cell marker highly expressed on gamma delta T cells
KLRC2 (NKG2C) is an activating NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic gamma delta T cells
LEF1 is a Wnt pathway transcription factor marking less differentiated T cell subsets
TCF7 is a key transcription factor for T cell development and marks naive/memory T cells
XCL1 (lymphotactin) is a chemokine characteristically produced by gamma delta T cells and NK cells
Granulysin is a cytotoxic effector molecule highly expressed in cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
Granzyme B is a key cytotoxic effector protease defining cytotoxic T cell function
Granzyme H is a cytotoxic granule protease enriched in effector CD8+ T cells
CD8A is the canonical surface marker defining CD8+ T cells
Perforin is essential for cytotoxic granule-mediated killing by CD8+ T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule membrane protein marking activated cytotoxic lymphocytes
FGFBP2 is a marker of terminally differentiated cytotoxic effector CD8+ T cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic effector CD8+ T cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly expressed by effector/memory CD8+ T cells
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein and canonical endothelial cell marker
PECAM1 (CD31) is a definitive endothelial cell surface marker used for identification
Von Willebrand factor is a glycoprotein produced almost exclusively by endothelial cells
SPARCL1 is highly expressed in endothelial cells and involved in vascular biology
FABP4 is expressed in capillary endothelial cells involved in fatty acid transport
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor important for vascular development
SOX17 is a transcription factor critical for endothelial cell identity and arterial specification
Aquaporin 1 is a water channel highly expressed in endothelial cells
CAVIN2 is a caveolae-associated protein enriched in endothelial cells
Granulysin is a cytotoxic effector molecule expressed by NK cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor marking immature/developing NK cells
Granzyme K is enriched in immature/CD56bright NK cells compared to mature NK cells
L-selectin (CD62L) is expressed on immature NK cells and lost upon maturation
XCL2 is a chemokine characteristically produced by NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor expressed early in NK cell development
CMC1 is expressed in NK/T lymphocytes and marks immature NK populations
IL-1β is a key pro-inflammatory cytokine defining inflammatory macrophage activation
CXCL8 (IL-8) is a neutrophil-recruiting chemokine produced by inflammatory macrophages
CXCL3 is a pro-inflammatory chemokine secreted by activated macrophages
CCL20 is an inflammatory chemokine produced by activated macrophages
SOD2 is upregulated in inflammatory macrophages as part of the oxidative stress response
PTGS2 (COX-2) is a hallmark inflammatory enzyme in activated macrophages
IL-10 is an anti-inflammatory cytokine produced by macrophages during inflammation resolution
Epiregulin is an EGF family member upregulated in inflammatory macrophages
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker broadly expressed across ILC populations
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for ILC2 and broadly marks ILC lineages
KIT (CD117) is expressed on ILC progenitors and multiple ILC subsets
IL-7 receptor (CD127) is a key marker of ILCs required for their development and survival
IL1RL1 (ST2/IL-33R) is a canonical ILC2 marker responding to IL-33 signaling
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is highly expressed on ILCs, particularly ILC2s
TNFRSF4 (OX40) is expressed on activated ILCs and marks ILC populations
Amphiregulin is a tissue-repair effector molecule characteristically produced by ILC2s
IL-32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine expressed by ILC1s involved in immune activation
IL-7R (CD127) is a canonical ILC marker essential for ILC1 maintenance
ETS1 is a transcription factor important for ILC1 and NK cell development
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILC1s and NK cells
ITGB1 (CD29) is expressed on tissue-resident ILC1s for tissue retention
SPOCK2 is enriched in ILC1 populations and distinguishes them from other ILC subsets
IL1RL1 (ST2) is the IL-33 receptor and a canonical ILC2 marker
GATA3 is the master transcription factor defining ILC2 identity
RORA is a transcription factor essential for ILC2 development and function
HPGD (prostaglandin dehydrogenase) is highly expressed in ILC2s for prostaglandin metabolism
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical surface marker of ILC2s
IL-7R (CD127) is essential for ILC2 survival and a key identifying marker
SLAMF1 is a surface receptor enriched on ILC2s in human tissues
CCR4 is a chemokine receptor expressed on ILC2s for tissue homing
KIT (CD117) is a canonical marker of ILC3s essential for their identification
CCR6 marks the LTi-like ILC3 subset and is a key ILC3 surface marker
IL-7R (CD127) is required for ILC3 development and homeostasis
IL-1R1 is expressed on ILC3s enabling responsiveness to IL-1β stimulation

DLL1 (Delta-like 1) is a Notch ligand expressed by ILC3s
RUNX2 is a transcription factor involved in ILC3 differentiation programs
IL-7R is essential for ILC precursor survival and development
KIT (CD117) marks ILC precursors with multilineage potential

TNFRSF18 (GITR) is expressed on ILC precursors and early ILC lineage cells

TNFRSF4 (OX40) is expressed on ILC precursors during early development
CD7 is expressed on lymphoid precursors including ILC progenitors

FABP5 is a lipid-handling protein highly enriched in lipid-associated macrophages
APOE is a hallmark gene of lipid-associated macrophages involved in lipid metabolism

SPP1 (osteopontin) is a canonical LAM marker associated with tissue remodeling
LIPA (lysosomal acid lipase) is essential for lipid processing in LAMs
Lipoprotein lipase is a key lipid metabolism enzyme defining the LAM phenotype
CD68 is a lysosomal glycoprotein and canonical macrophage marker
GPNMB is a glycoprotein highly expressed in lipid-laden macrophages
CD36 is a scavenger receptor for lipid uptake, defining LAM function
Granulysin is a cytotoxic effector molecule highly expressed in mature NK cells

FCGR3A (CD16) is a canonical marker of mature CD56dim NK cells mediating ADCC
KLRF1 (NKp80) is an activating receptor specific to NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor forming heterodimers with NKG2 family members

FGFBP2 is a marker of terminally differentiated cytotoxic CD56dim NK cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta chain) is part of the NK cell signaling complex
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical surface marker of MAIT cells

RORA is a transcription factor characteristic of MAIT cells driving their type-17 program
CCR6 is expressed on MAIT cells for mucosal tissue homing
Granzyme K is characteristically expressed by MAIT cells
NCR3 (NKp30) is expressed on MAIT cells and contributes to their innate-like function
KLRG1 is an inhibitory receptor expressed on activated/effector MAIT cells
S100A9 is a canonical myeloid marker forming calprotectin with S100A8
S100A8 is a myeloid-specific alarmin and key marker of myeloid lineage cells

Ficolin-1 is a pattern recognition molecule marking myeloid/monocytic cells

NLRP3 inflammasome component is characteristic of myeloid cells

CD40LG (CD154) is expressed on CD4+ T cells for B cell help and is CD4-specific
MAF is a transcription factor involved in CD4+ T cell differentiation programs
CD2 is a T cell surface marker expressed on naive T cells
CXCR4 is expressed on naive T cells for lymph node homing
CD69 is an early activation marker on T cells, also marking tissue-resident populations
CD8A is the canonical marker defining CD8+ T cells
CD8B forms the CD8 heterodimer and specifically marks conventional CD8+ T cells
Granzyme K is characteristic of early effector/naive-like CD8+ T cells
CCL5 is expressed by CD8+ T cells upon initial activation
CRTAM is expressed on recently activated CD8+ T cells
RUNX3 is a transcription factor essential for CD8+ T cell lineage commitment
XCL1 is a chemokine highly produced by NK-like cells
XCL2 is a chemokine characteristically produced by NK and NK-like cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor marking NK-like lymphocytes
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in NK and NK-like cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein for NK cell activating receptors
FCER1G is a signaling adaptor for NK cell activating receptors
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK cell receptor expressed on NK-like cells
Amphiregulin production distinguishes tissue NK-like cells with regulatory functions
S100A9 is a canonical neutrophil marker forming calprotectin, highly abundant in neutrophils
S100A8 is a neutrophil-enriched alarmin and key neutrophil identification marker
Versican is highly expressed in neutrophils and involved in their migration
SERPINB2 (PAI-2) is upregulated in activated neutrophils

SLC11A1 (NRAMP1) is expressed in neutrophil phagosomes for antimicrobial defense
AQP9 is a water/glycerol channel highly expressed in neutrophils
CD93 is expressed on neutrophils and involved in phagocytosis
LST1 is highly expressed in nonclassical monocytes and involved in immune regulation
MS4A7 is a specific marker of nonclassical (CD16+) monocytes
AIF1 (IBA1) is a monocyte/macrophage marker enriched in nonclassical monocytes

SERPINA1 (alpha-1 antitrypsin) is produced by monocytes, enriched in nonclassical subset

KLRC1 (NKG2A) is expressed on tissue-resident NK cells

HSP70 family member upregulated in stressed/activated monocytes distinguishing type 2 from type 1
CCR7 is a lymph node homing receptor marking mature/migratory dendritic cells

HLA-DRA is an MHC class II molecule highly expressed on antigen-presenting cDC2s
IL1R2 (decoy IL-1 receptor) is enriched in cDC2b dendritic cells
